subject: 【BaziAI】积分补偿通知 - 为您添加了 {{credits}} 个积分 | Credits Compensation - {{credits}} Credits Added
html:
尊敬的 {{nickname}} 用户，

感谢您一直以来对 BaziAI 的支持与信任。

我们注意到您之前在使用过程中遇到了一些问题，系统未能及时回复您的提问。为表歉意，我们已向您的账户添加了 {{credits}} 个积分作为补偿。

积分详情：

  • 补偿积分数量：{{credits}} 个
  • 积分有效期：自动发放日起 30 天内有效
  • 积分用途：可用于 BaziAI 的所有付费功能

这些积分已自动添加到您的账户中，您可以立即登录 BaziAI 平台查看和使用。

我们一直在努力改进我们的服务质量，如果您有任何问题或建议，欢迎直接回复本邮件与 BaziAI 创作者沟通。

立即查看我的积分

感谢您的理解与支持！

此致，
BaziAI 团队

Dear {{nickname}},

Thank you for your continued support and trust in BaziAI.

We noticed that you previously encountered some issues where our system was unable to respond to your questions in a timely manner. As a token of our apology, we have added {{credits}} credits to your account as compensation.

Credit Details:

  • Compensation credits: {{credits}}
  • Validity period: 30 days from the date of issuance
  • Usage: Can be used for all premium features on BaziAI

These credits have been automatically added to your account. You can log in to the BaziAI platform immediately to view and use them.

We are constantly working to improve our service quality. If you have any questions or suggestions, please feel free to reply directly to this email to communicate with the BaziAI creator.

View My Credits Now

Thank you for your understanding and support!

Best regards,
BaziAI Team
